data.body: BLOCKER DIAGNOSED + FIX: story plan-review attestations were UNSCOPED (empty file_impact + citations didn't resolve to deps). For unscoped sshsig attestations the claim gate (llm/plan_review/attest.py:587-599) compares merged_log_commit (recorded as the TICKETS-branch HEAD, e.g. 2165ee5c) against signing.head_sha (the CODE HEAD ba2fb1dd4) — two different branches, never equal -> permanent 'stale-head', claim blocked despite a valid PASS. The epic claimed fine because it was SCOPED (dep files -> drift-rehash path lines 571-586, no head compare). FIX: set file_impact (existing dep files the plan verifies) on all 5 stories -> scoped attestations -> claim-stable regardless of tickets-branch advance. This also satisfies the P9 advisory. Re-reviewing all stories scoped; validating on 79da's claim first.
